chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No. D- 1521 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on CMA 7345/2021 2.For hearing of main case 26-04-2023 None present for the petitioner. ***** None present for the petitioner; same was the position on the last date of hearing, which shows that the petitioner after filing instant petition has lost his interest. Accordingly, this petition stands dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
